creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Bob

Try the following:
OPTIONS_DEFINE=        EXAMPLES PROFILE
OPTIONS_SUB=   yes
PROFILE_MAKE_ENV_OFF=  NO_PROFILES=true

nothing else should be needed to make the PROFILE opition behave well. 
[no manual _PLIST_SUB= and _PLIST_SUB_OFF needed].


Or what issue do you have with it?

mfg Tobias
